title: steffensia elongata
intro: Steffensia elongata, also known as the "tree of life," is a medicinal plant native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Steffensia elongata is believed to have numerous health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be found in various traditional Filipino remedies.
